text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! To think that you won just for me...
Thank you so very much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must say, though, this clothing is immaculately
crafted...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The weave of the cloth, the texture of each
accessory... Oh! Even the stitching and thread
color are true to life...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I still have so much to learn... ♪
